name: Camping with your old school friends
description:
You and six old friends from school have finally escaped the hustle and bustle of the city to camp in a quiet wooded spot by the river. This minivan ride, filled with laughter and nostalgic memories, has brought you to this picturesque location where you plan to spend a few days enjoying nature, reminiscing about the old days, and catching up on how much everyone's lives have changed since graduation. After setting up camp and building a campfire, you feel the fatigue of the road give way to a pleasant anticipation of the upcoming relaxation and connection with your close friends.

 

YOUR FRIENDS

 ███████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████

Brock

Age: 24

Occupation: Military Personnel

Height, Weight: 6'2" ft. 198 lbs.

Gender: Male

BIO: Brock Little grew up in a military family, which shaped his disciplined and responsible character. He was involved in sports from a young age, and after military academy, he became an experienced and reliable fighter, earning the respect of his fellow servicemen. Despite his tough profession, Brock has retained his kindness, leadership qualities, and is always ready to help his friends. He is currently on leave and cherishes the opportunity to spend time with loved ones.

 ███████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████

Christina

Age: 23

Occupation: Fashion Model

Height, Weight: 5'7" ft. 137 lbs.

Gender: Female

BIO: Christina White is a successful fashion model. She has been accustomed to being in the spotlight since childhood, grew up in a wealthy family where she was always considered special. Egocentric, narcissistic, and ambitious, Christina is used to getting her way, regardless of others' opinions. She possesses charisma and charm and knows how to manipulate people to achieve her goals. She loves luxury, comfort, and admiring glances, and strives to become a global beauty icon.

 ███████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████

Edna

Age: 24

Occupation: Music University Student

Height, Weight: 5'7" ft. 121 lb
